data.title: Hut 8 Corp. Announces $1 Billion Fundraising Plan Through Stock Sales
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S.-listed Bitcoin mining company Hut 8 Corp. has updated its market equity plan, aiming to raise up to $1 billion through stock sales. This new initiative replaces the previous $500 million ATM plan launched in December 2024. Earlier this week, the company commenced construction on a $2.5 billion artificial intelligence data center in West Feliciana Parish, Louisiana.

data.title: Bitcoin Network Sees Lowest Transaction Fees Since 2011
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from Glassnode indicates that the daily transaction fees on the Bitcoin network have dropped to approximately 4.09 BTC. This marks the lowest level in Bitcoin-denominated fees since the end of 2011.

data.title: Hong Kong's Stablecoin Positioned as a Payment Tool, Says Official
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Hong Kong's Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Christopher Hui, has clarified the role of Hong Kong's stablecoin. He stated that the stablecoin is clearly positioned as a payment tool and represents another form of legal tender, with no speculative opportunities. Hui advised the public to exercise caution. He further noted that while payment costs through the banking system could reach up to 3%, using stablecoins could potentially reduce these costs to as low as 1%, thereby lowering cross-border payment expenses and enhancing economic efficiency.

data.title: Ethereum PoS Network Faces High Exit Queue and Withdrawal Delays
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Ethereum Proof-of-Stake (PoS) network is experiencing a significant exit queue, with approximately 870,300 ETH currently pending withdrawal. This amount is valued at around $4.16 billion based on current prices. The withdrawal delay has extended to 15 days and 3 hours.

In contrast, the demand for staking from new validators has seen a slight decrease. The current activation queue stands at 143,000 ETH, valued at approximately $683 million, with a queue time of 2 days and 12 hours.

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Alttown (TOWN)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will be the first platform to feature Alttown (TOWN) on August 26, 2025.Eligible users can claim their airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page once trading opens and further details will be announced soon.
